title: Evangelion and the golem legend
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion and the golem legend             Quote Post by NRTOOD » Sat Jul 17, 2010 3:08 pm Any evangelion occultists/estoricists/mystics here. i remember when i watched evangelion ep 21 there was many Ayanami's in a tank. It is immediately reminded me of the jewish folktale about the Golem and and the kabbalist rebai maharal who created it. I searched in google and found some stuff on the connection between evangelion and the folktale. Here is an example: Evangelion is teeming with Hebrew and Biblical lore besides the Sephirothic System, with the EVA units possibly connected to the legend of the Golem, a giant artificial man which does its creator's bidding, the mystical Hebrew calligraphy at the very end of the opening credits resembling that found in the seventeenth century "Book of Raziel," the Hebrew code-names given the "Angels," the mysterious "remains of Adam," the quote from Genesis 2:8-9 that is the apparent epigram of the series, the line from Browning that is the motto of NERV, and the suggestion that the Angels' attacks were foretold by the Dead Sea Scrolls, the oldest fragments of Jewish scripture, discovered in 1947. Take Anno's remarks about how Evangelion was going to involve some big questions about the truth between God and man, and combine it with these mysterious, mystic clues scattered throughout the series--already giving rise to many fan "theories" about where Eva is leading--and it's not too much to say that those who like The X-Files may find a lot to like here as well.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jul 17, 2010 4:00 pm Rei and the Evangelions are probably more like Homunculi than Golems, as they're made of organic material and have minds.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Jul 17, 2010 4:56 pm Jet Alone would be a better fit for the Golem, imho.

[]: Ah, one of my favorite subjects...             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sat Jul 17, 2010 5:51 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Rei and the Evangelions are probably more like Homunculi than Golems, as they're made of organic material and have minds.

[]:             Quote Post by NRTOOD » Sat Jul 17, 2010 6:06 pm I came with an idea to search in the hebrew net about this connection, and i found more than i wished for. I found a summary of a complete research about evangelion from mystical viewpoint. The research is sliced to 3 parts, each one is brutally long and i could not read it all in one night. The research is made in a blog of a technomystican. There is a short mentioning of the golem and Rei Ayanami and i translate: "Ayanami Rei is a wierd and quiet teenager who doesn't show feeling and for a matter of fact doesn't have feelings. She lives alone and the only human relationship in her life for most of the series is with gendo ikari, Shinji's father. Late in the series in episode 23 we will find out that the meaning of Rei name is "zero" and she is a kind of a golem made of red clay. She has many replacements, Rei figures that hover in a giant aquarium full with the blood of the second angel lilith. Everyone of those Rei figures is a shell, and only the Rei that lives outside keep a soul in her. The body of Rei is composed from the matter of lilith (to which eva no.1 is connected and Shinji pilots) but she's a genetic and soul shaped clone of yui ikari, Shinji's mother. In another place in the series it is said that if Shinji was born a girl, gendo and yui would call her Rei. Rei is for Shinji a type of mother and sister and the implied erotic relationship between them (which join the implied erotic relationship between Shinji and his symolic mother, Misato) therefore similar to the devloped incest relationships of the kabbalah." I wonder how much of this information (and in the research at all) is found in this site?

[]: Rei's boobs represent the ego and superego. Discuss.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sat Jul 17, 2010 6:26 pm NRTOOD wrote: I wonder how much of this information (and in the research at all) is found in this site?

[]:             Quote Post by berto » Sat Jul 17, 2010 6:44 pm Well, don't shy away from posting more of it. What language are translating this from, again? As for the argument that it's a Homunculi, well it's all realtive, they're all human creations made to look human. She is certainly not a humonculi, she is a clone, the scientific equvalent of one, same way the golem is the Kabalan equivelent of a humonculi. It's not going to be a literal Golem, nor would it be a litteral serpent or burning bush if those images pressent, there would be scientific replacements. It's about creating human life without procreation. You can even take it one step further and make parallels to Frankenstien's creation, which is one of the major themes of the story, Frankenstein's god complex. Also, there have been a lot of arguments and implications that Shelley's creature is also a Golem.

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Sat Jul 17, 2010 6:51 pm berto wrote: You can even take it one step further and make parallels to Frankenstien's creation, which is one of the major themes of the story, Frankenstein's god complex. Also, there have been a lot of arguments and implications that Shelley's creature is also a Golem.

[]:             Quote Post by NRTOOD » Sat Jul 17, 2010 8:28 pm Hey, i can begin translate the article but only begin (because me and my family go on vacation on thursday for 10 days, and that means no computer around. But if you want me to continue translate after that, just give a shout.) But, one thing, this site studies evangelion vigorously so maybe the article wont say too many new things, if this is the case please don't be mad or impatient because it is not my fault. I can poke out of my hand some more esoteric currents evangelion could be suited to. For example there is the gnostics, we can say that seele and nerve could be some kind of ambigious believers between gnostics and monotheists. The gnostic esotericism claimed there was one true god which was all benelovent and feminine in his qualities, on the other side there is the demiurge, which the gnostics claimed was the god of the jews (of course the jews in turn saw the gnostics as a pervert belief). Why the god of the jews? because he was the god of matter, and that you can see in his commands which are aimed for material action. The gnostics believed one should forget this world and concentrate in the spritiual world, the real world. Evangelion has a kabbalistic mythology in part, on the other hand you can say that seele and nerv wanted that their project would bring through Shinji all people back to the spiritual god, which is why it is difficult to say what they were. And gnosticism influenced kabbalah. This is the main reason i think evangelion is in part influenced by gnosticism. The other one is shamanism. We can say the whole series is the story of Shinji in a shamanic journey. The is a type of shamanic journey when the shaman start to suffer from a porolonged psychosis and has visions. In the end the shaman go down to the underworld and come back without psychosis and as a new healed personality that is stronger than the old personality. Sure part of that happens to Shinji. The third thing that evangelion reminds me is the new world order conspiracy theories in which there is a qabal of secret societies that rule the world behind the scenes (nerv/seele) and want to exterminate most of the world popultion and to leave the 10% chosen few. Which is also similar to evangelion. I think the is the peculiarness of evangelion. You can extract numerous ideas from it.

[]:             Quote Post by berto » Sat Jul 17, 2010 9:51 pm You know what you could do is print the articles and come back to us in 10 days. Anyway, there is a huge imphesis on the feminine on the series, primarely two of the the keys to insrumentality are female, Unit 01 and Rei. Unit 01 was made to replace the god of origin, Adam, in the eventual third impact. It's also not a big surprise that any ancient culture would consider their god female as blasphemy, that's pretty common. It's the other ones that surprise me.

[]:             Quote Post by NRTOOD » Sun Jul 18, 2010 11:15 am You know what you could do is print the articles and come back to us in 10 days.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Jul 18, 2010 11:18 am NRTOOD wrote: And in evangelion we have god with gender (male), no?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Jul 18, 2010 3:25 pm NRTOOD wrote: "Ayanami Rei is a wierd and quiet teenager who doesn't show feeling and for a matter of fact doesn't have feelings.

[]:             Quote Post by NRTOOD » Sun Jul 18, 2010 5:47 pm Ok, first, i had taken the liberty to translate only the parts that less reharse the series narrative, because you already know it and it is talking mainly about behind the scens (like how anno hired Japanese experts in the talmud to add the mystic aura to the show) and rehash of the narrative. Second, this is only the beginning so if you don't find anything new it doesn't matter, maybe in the end this article will succeed in telling something new (i hope). "... The three kids become a talented team which acts for nerv. An agency whose goal is to defeat the angels and promote a secret plan called "human complementation" project or "instrumentality project". This is a plan which purpose to bring evolutionary jump to the human race. According to the messianic mission of nerv and seele, the secret organisation which keep an eye on nerv, the consciousness of all humans and humanity wiil merge into one consciousness and all the living souls will merge. Humanity will become one entity deviod of disadventages and a kind of godhead. This is similar to the omega point theory of the 20th century catholic theologician pierre tier de shardan which influenced a lot on the new age movement. The messianic plan is based according to seele and gendo, on the dead sea scrolls. But the treatment in evangelion to the origin of the prophecies is general and undetailed. Here is, in the komeran there found a couple of texts with surprisingly similar story to which evangelion tells. Texts such as the book of enoch, the jubliees book, and the book of giants. Which interpret genesis chapters 6, 1-4 in more broad manner and also the part which discuss the forbidden connection of god descendants and human daughters which the disasterous results was the nephilim. In evangelion the sons of god are the angels. The humans came in touch with the first angel adam in the second impact incident which the world governments tried to silence out and said it was a result of a meteorite collide in antartica. In the hebrew bible, the nephilim disaster completes the deluge. The second impact which leads to huge explosion which makes antartica melt and as a result leads to a world flood which cause half of the human population to begone from the world. The result of the unification between the humans and the angels are the evas. Which are the evangelion nephilim. What are the evas? the question echoes toward all the series. In the beginning the evas are presented as a big sophisticated robot. But when time pass by thing turn as not that simple. The eva is a creation not only psychological but also biotechnological. She is a a nephilic body for real, one which blood flows from it's face and bandages put on his wounds. There was a cases when the when the energy source of the eva ended and she turned back to act for herself. It means that the eva has it's own will and with the story progress it is revealed that the sophisticated armored technology of the eva is for a matter of fact a restrainting techological shell for a biological meaning of an enormous and primeval force. A technological cables the stop the eva from willing to its own. More than that, eva has a soul too. In eva no 1 which Shinji pilots yui ikari Shinji's mother is found. In eva 02 which Asuka pilots exists kyoko tseplin soryu, her mother. It is not clear what soul exist in eva 00 but according to the eva rage bursts which tries to eliminate gendo and Rei many people think that it is naoko akagi, the mother of the gehirn scientist ritsuko akagi, which was in her life the lover of gendo and hated Rei, to Rei incranated the soul of yui. The second parts in every eva core is divineness. The evas are the attempt of the humans to use the power of the first angel, adam, which the human race took control off and reduce him to an ovum. The evas are the result of the copulation of adam, which according to kaworu the source of all other angels, and the humans. the result is a huge biological creature whith hakf divine powers. The similarties in the nephlim biblical story, the external books in one hand, and the angels story, the three mothers and the evas in evangelion seems to similar to be a pure coincidence. There is a clear vision here of the biblical and external books myths. In contrast to those who claim there is no similarities to real texts. The human complementation plan is destinied to come to light after the coming of all the angels as stated in the komeran scrolls. The copulation of the angels with the humans will cause a third impact which will exterminate al human kind. The angels which try to return to the body of adam, their mother, are stopped by the evas. despite the fact that formally, seele and nerv try to stop the third impact which the angels try to create, their hidden goal is to create another type of third impact by copulation of adam in lilith, which is the mother of all humankind which kaoru, the 17th angel, calls lilim, which is the name of the 100 demons sons of lilith. The human complentation will solve the negligibility and nullity of human kind, as ritsuko describes in episode 25: "There is an emptiness in our souls – a fundemental incompleteness that has haunted all beings since the very first thought. [slide: This void is the cause of anxiety & fear]. The darkness will never vanish as long as mankind is merely human"". That's it for today. Meanwhile it is just the basics. Comments are welcome.
